# Vendored Browser Libraries

These files are loaded locally by `index.html` so an active Codex session does
not depend on CDN reachability during login, reconnect, replay, or rendering.

- `marked.min.js`: marked v15.0.12, MIT license, downloaded from jsDelivr.
- `purify.min.js`: DOMPurify v3.4.12, Apache-2.0/MPL-2.0, downloaded from jsDelivr.
- `purify.min.js.map`: source map referenced by `purify.min.js`.
- `highlight.min.js`: Highlight.js v11.9.0, BSD-3-Clause, downloaded from jsDelivr.
- `atom-one-light.min.css`: Highlight.js v11.9.0 theme, downloaded from jsDelivr.
